content:
# Dammam Area

**Summary**: A specific geographic region within the Eastern Province.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2000-mohammad|Mohammad, 2000]] studied the Dammam area to conduct field surveys of the Khobar aquifer.

- [[2016-lawal-2|Lawal, 2016]] evaluated PM10 concentrations and mineralogy in Dammam.

- [[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022]] focused on the Dammam area to assess local air quality impacts from industrial sources.

- [[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023]] conducted a case study in the Dammam Dome to validate the joint inversion approach.

- [[2023-alsahwan|AlSahwan, 2023]] conducted field tests at a site near Dammam to validate the inversion method.

- [[2024-tarchi|Tarchi, 2024]] conducted field studies at a site near Dammam Airport to collect seismic and electrical data.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2000-mohammad|Mohammad, 2000]] Arabian Shelf

- [[2016-lawal-2|Lawal, 2016]] evaluated PM10 concentrations and mineralogy in Dammam.

- [[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022]] focused on the Dammam area to assess local air quality impacts from industrial sources.

- [[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023]] conducted a case study in the Dammam Dome to validate the joint inversion approach.

- [[2023-alsahwan|AlSahwan, 2023]] conducted field tests at a site near Dammam to validate the inversion method.

- [[2024-tarchi|Tarchi, 2024]] conducted field studies at a site near Dammam Airport to collect seismic and electrical data.

## Formations Present

- [[2000-mohammad|Mohammad, 2000]] Dammam Formation, Khobar Member

## Key Findings From This Location

- The study area includes several key aquifers and is located along the Arabian Gulf coast. ([[2000-mohammad|Mohammad, 2000, p. 18]])

- The average concentration of particulate matter in Dammam was 126.69 µg/m3. ([[2016-lawal-2|Lawal, 2016, p. 52]])

- Average annual temperature rose by 1°C and wind speed dropped by 0.6 m/s over a decade. ([[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022, p. 43]])

- The results showed that the approach was able to delineate the major geological structures of the area, including faults, fractures, and lithological boundaries. ([[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023, p. 17]])

- The study area was located 30 km east of Dhahran city. ([[2023-alsahwan|AlSahwan, 2023, p. 37]])

- The study area is located approximately 30 km east of Dhahran city. ([[2024-tarchi|Tarchi, 2024, p. 40]])
